chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.S-471 of 2023 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Hearing/Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.3666/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 29.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Bhutta, Advocate for the Petitioner along with Mr. Muhammad Zareef Lakho, Advocate. Khawaja Saif-ul-Islam, Advocate for the Respondent. --------------------- By consent of both the learned counsels and in the presence of the respective parties, it is ordered as follows: - (i) Instant petition is allowed, impugned order passed in G & W Appeal No.100 of 2023 is set-aside and the matter is remanded back to the learned XXIXth Family Judge East in G & W Appl. No.4820/2022. The learned Family Court shall record evidence of the respective parties and dispose of the matter within sixty days from today, excluding summer vacations. (ii) In the meantime, the minor shall meet the Respondent at his residence in the presence of bailiff of this Court for three hours fortnightly starting from day after tomorrow i.e. 31.05.2025, cost of which shall be borne by the Respondent. (iii) On the 2nd day of Eid-ul-Azha, the minor shall meet the Respondent at his residence for a period of four hours and in the presence of the bailiff of this Court. (iv) Needless to mention that this order shall supersede any arrangement made earlier by the respective Court. Accordingly, petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application.

The learned Family Court shall record evidence of the respective parties and dispose of the matter within sixty days from today, excluding summer vacations. (ii) In the meantime, the minor shall meet the Respondent at his residence in the presence of bailiff of this Court for three hours fortnightly starting from day after tomorrow i.e. 31.05.2025, cost of which shall be borne by the Respondent. (iii) On the 2nd day of Eid-ul-Azha, the minor shall meet the Respondent at his residence for a period of four hours and in the presence of the bailiff of this Court. (iv) Needless to mention that this order shall supersede any arrangement made earlier by the respective Court. Accordingly, petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. J U D G E Nadeem
